title: The Straw Hats Enter Zou
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the straw hats enter zou within the Climbing the Elephant storyline.
scene: Luffy's group climbs Zunesha, loses Kinemon and Kanjuro behind them, then enters the empty and damaged Mokomo Dukedom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ryu- Nosuke!!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: RYuunosuke!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What a joke.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It was just a crappy old drawing anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hold up, I heard that!!! Take that back, you jerks!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He worked his butt off to take us all the way here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've set foot into unknown land... We don't have the luxury of looking back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Invest your con- centration in what's ahead of you and keep your wits about you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Check it out! That's the gates to this country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So an entire civilization... truly exists on the back of this elephant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They even have sentry watchtowers in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But I see no guards...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're pretty undermanned for a place that's meant to be the entry way into an entire country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: what a & carefree lot...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ooooi usop! Come look at this, it's amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You don't waste any time do you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is so awesome!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think that all this is resting on the back of a gigantic thousand-year elephant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's an entire country here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So awesome!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this truly all on the back of an elephant!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's forests, rivers, and even entire towns!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is pretty sweet, it totally feels like we're on another island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: BUT THAT TOWN...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's kinda....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WHOOOOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy jumped off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'Course he did... D'you see the human eyebrow?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nope, I'm too far away to get a clear look...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZORO... are you certain we should go on ahead without waiting for kinemon?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This place may be huge but it's not like it's an entire continent or anything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let's keep moving.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He didn't need to jump over the walls... the gates are wide open for crying out loud.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Wait! I'm headed towards you guys now!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I wouldn't exactly call this "wide open"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It seems someone busted them open...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Not only that, this path seems a bit off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a bit too wide to be some- thing made by the beasts of the forest...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is clearly the remnants of some kind of destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These tracks are still fresh, too!! Is it safe!? Do you think they're okay?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We'd best tread lightly then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Ehh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't even know who or what lies beyond!? You're gonna jump the gun and assume they're enemies?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Uuh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: DAAAANG...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This path is definitely not people friendly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: That's because it's elephant skin...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Flowers are blooming in rather weird and awkward places.

summary: The Straw Hats Enter Zou: Luffy's group reaches the country on Zunesha's back, loses Kinemon and Kanjuro temporarily, and discovers that Zou has already been devastated.
